title: Black/White Redstone Lamps
description: Makes Redstone lamps easy to read. Great for redstone displays. Black is Off, White is On.
body: Makes Redstone Lamps into Black and white pixels. Black when off, White when On Great for Redstone Displays, Computional Redstone, and everything in between. Made With Displays in mind. Coming soon: One that makes Redstone Lamps White when Off, Black when on.
